highlights.text: I wrote on Thursday at 4pm: “My general lean is to defer to the trend.
My general lean is to defer to the trend until it ends for tomorrow, bulls want to hold 5970/63 and 5925 if we get a slightly larger dip.” We saw exactly this.
As I have also stated very repetitiously though, institutions buy dips in a highly repetitive way, via my core setup: The Failed Breakdown.
This in turn, setup my core setup: The Failed Breakdown.

I wrote Friday at 4pm: “Below 5945 we work back down to that 5925 level again, and this is a big one… Ideally, I’d look for a Failed Breakdown of today’s low to long here.” 5925 was Friday’s daily low and we flushed it Sunday evening down to 5893, recovered it yesterday, and longs triggered for a large squeeze to 5990 last night.

In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into the Failed Breakdown we saw yesterday morning of 5925 which triggered yesterdays 60+ point squeeze, and I’ll then discuss the actionable trade plan for tomorrow.

post_title: [Re-Send With Chart] SPX Snaps Its 6 Green Day Win Streak. Will The Dip Get Bought? May 21 Plan
